findings.description: State seal image and DEQ logo are missing from the HTML version of the cover letter
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows the North Carolina state seal at the top center and DEQ logo with contact info at the bottom. HTML page 2 shows neither the state seal nor the DEQ logo, though the footer text is present as plain text.
PDF page 1 shows Kevin Hart's handwritten signature. HTML page 2 also shows the signature but it appears as a smaller/different rendering.

findings.description: HTML page 2 includes duplicate footer information not present as separate text in the PDF
findings.evidence: HTML page 2 has additional footer text 'North Carolina Department of Environmental Quality | Division of Water Resources, 512 N. Salisbury Street..., 919-707-9000' rendered as separate lines at the bottom, duplicating what was in the DEQ logo area of the PDF.

findings.description: Report title page missing border/box formatting
findings.evidence: PDF page 3 shows the title page with a visible border/box around the content area. HTML page 3 does not show this border.

findings.description: Roanoke Rapids Lake row shows different Proposed Cooperator Funding Amount
findings.evidence: PDF page 4 (table on page 8 of document) shows Roanoke Rapids Lake with Proposed Cooperator Funding Amount of $2,000.00. HTML page 10 also shows $2,000.00, which matches. However, the Proposed State Funding Amount is $4,000.00 in both - the discrepancy between state and cooperator amounts is present in both versions, so this is consistent.

findings.description: NC WRC Alligatorweed row shows mismatched Cooperator Funding Amount
findings.evidence: PDF page 6 shows NC WRC - Land & Water Access, Alligatorweed, Northeast NC Waterfowl Habitat Improvement with State Funding $3,100.00 and Cooperator Funding $18,100.00. HTML page 14 also shows $3,100.00 and $18,100.00, so this is consistent.

findings.description: NC Parks & Recreation row missing project name in PDF
findings.evidence: PDF page 4 shows NC Parks & Recreation with $1,000.00 for lake-wide surveys but with blank project column. HTML page 11 also shows blank project for this row, so consistent.

findings.description: 3/16/2022 8161 Dare County Southern channel row missing dollar sign in Amount column
findings.evidence: PDF page 5 Shallow Draft table shows the second 3/16/2022 8161 Dare County Southern channel entry with amount '12,344.94' without a dollar sign. HTML page 6 shows the same value without dollar sign, so this is consistent.

findings.description: The Shallow Draft Navigation Channel Dredging table on page 3 of the PDF is rendered as an image in the HTML rather than as a proper HTML table, meaning all data rows from that table are not searchable/accessible as text.
findings.evidence: PDF page 3 contains a detailed table with 43+ rows of dredging projects (dates, project names, cooperators, amounts, project types) totaling $9,543,427.32. The HTML replaces this with:

findings.description: The Due Date on the cover/title page is inconsistent between the cover letter and the report title page. The PDF title page says 'Due Date: Oct. 1, 2021' and the cover letter says 'October 1, 2022'. The HTML faithfully reproduces this inconsistency from the PDF, so it is not an HTML error per se, but noting it. However, the HTML states the report covers 'FY 2021-2022' consistent with the PDF.
findings.evidence: PDF page 2: 'Due Date: Oct. 1, 2021'; PDF page 1 cover letter: 'October 1, 2022'. HTML reproduces both. This is a source document inconsistency, not an HTML conversion error.

findings.description: The document title on page 2 'Annual Report on Projects Funded by the Shallow Draft Navigation Channel Dredging and Aquatic Weed' is split awkwardly in the HTML with 'Fund Statutory Authority' appearing as a separate paragraph rather than being part of the heading structure.
findings.evidence: PDF has this as a unified title page. HTML renders the title as <h2> but breaks it from the subtitle information. The heading text itself is accurate.

findings.description: In the Project Cooperators table at the bottom of the HTML, the Lake Gaston cooperators entry has a trailing comma suggesting truncation, and the Lake Norman and Mountain Island Reservoir entries appear to have their cooperator text split across rows incorrectly.
findings.evidence: PDF page 10 shows Lake Gaston cooperators as 'Halifax Co., Northampton Co., Warren Co.,' and Lake Norman as 'Lake Norman Marine Commission, Charlotte Water,' with Mountain Island Reservoir as 'Charlotte Stormwater Services and Duke Energy'. The HTML splits these into separate rows incorrectly, making it appear Mountain Island Reservoir's cooperator is 'Stormwater Services and Duke Energy' (missing 'Charlotte').

findings.description: The first image alt text is generic and describes the state seal and DEQ logo together, which is reasonable but the image actually contains the full letterhead with official names (ROY COOPER Governor, ELIZABETH S. BISER Secretary, RICHARD E. ROGERS, JR. Director).
findings.evidence: HTML: alt='North Carolina State Seal and DEQ Logo'. The image contains the full official letterhead including names and titles.
